narrative: BoC policy decision and Governor Macklem's press conference lead the session as CAD outperformance builds — USD/CAD at 1.4050; Fed 3.75% vs BoC 2.25% (150bp) carry sustains the USD bid despite softer US CPI repricing. NZD/CHF bilateral divergence dominates G10 (spread 1.810%) as hawkish RBNZ signals lift NZD; gold lower -0.99%; equities +0.38%; DXY -0.02%; VIX 16.3. Watch BoC Rate Decision at 13:45 UTC and ECB meeting July 23.
